message:
fix(codegen): Preserve module-level allocator in cache files

Local module imports were failing because __global_allocator was not
included in the generated cache files. The issue was:

1. imports.zig extracted module body starting from "pub const" which
   skipped the __gpa and __global_allocator declarations before it
2. compile.zig's extractStructBody only extracted struct contents,
   losing the allocator declarations

Fixed by:
- imports.zig: Include __gpa declarations when extracting module body
- compile.zig: Add extractModuleLevelDecls() to preserve allocator vars
  when writing to cache files

This ensures f-strings and other dynamic allocations work in imported
local modules.
